title: Sass & Belle Day Dreams Rainbow Money Bank
description: This Day Dreams Money Box is solid proof that even the smallest of accessories can brighten up a whole room! Add this wonderful rainbow to your child's room as a fun and adorable decoration for them to deposit their pocket money.
